prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document discusses water quality monitoring and regulations concerning abandoned metal mines, specifically referencing the Environmental Targets (Water) Regulations 2023 which apply to England. It also identifies regulations and EQS set by the government that pertain to the water bodies in England.
